code:
stateDiagram-v2
playerCount: Ask how many players
establishBonusPoints: Establish the Zap and Bonus

[Infra_WorkerNode] --> playerCount
playerCount --> establishBonusPoints

establishBonusPoints --> EstablishBust
state EstablishBust {Infra_WorkerNode] --> rollBust

	rollBust --> awardBustChoice

	awardBustChoice --> awardBustPoints: If exact match
	awardBustChoice --> offerHighRiskChoice: If not exact match

	offerHighRiskChoice --> offerHighRisk: If 2-6
	offerHighRiskChoice --> [Infra_IngressController]: If >= 7

	awardBustPoints --> offerHighRiskChoice: If >= 7

	offerHighRisk --> highRiskChoice

	highRiskChoice --> [Infra_RedisCache]: If declined

}

EstablishBust --> PressLoop

state PressLoop {Infra_IngressController] --> rollPress
	rollPress --> rollPress: As many times as they want

	rollPress --> goBust: If matches Bust dice
	rollPress --> awardPoints: If chooses "Stop"
	rollPress --> evilOffer: If rolled 2x more than expected

	goBust --> nextPlayer
	awardPoints --> nextPlayer
	evilOffer --> evilOfferChoice
	evilOfferChoice --> rollEvilOffer: If accepted
	evilOfferChoice --> awardPoints: If rejected

	rollEvilOffer --> displayBustEvilOffer
	rollEvilOffer --> displayWinEvilOffer
	displayBustEvilOffer --> nextPlayer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> rollPress
	displayWinEvilOffer --> evilOffer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> awardPoints

	nextPlayer --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
}

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个桌游的状态流转图，核心是两个大阶段：先EstablishBust建立爆点机制，然后进入PressLoop主循环。玩家从WorkerNode开始，先询问人数，然后建立Zap和Bonus分数。
明白。EstablishBust内部的具体流程是：掷骰子rollBust，然后awardBustChoice分支——精确匹配就awardBustPoints给分，不匹配就进入offerHighRiskChoice？这个高风险选项后面怎么接？
对。offerHighRiskChoice这里要分叉：掷出2-6就进入offerHighRisk，掷出7直接连到IngressController跳过这个环节。另外awardBustPoints如果结果是7，也要回到offerHighRiskChoice。
好的，EstablishBust部分画完了。高风险选择highRiskChoice如果被拒绝，就退到RedisCache结束这一回合，对吧？然后整个EstablishBust结束进入PressLoop。
PressLoop是核心循环。从IngressController开始rollPress，玩家可以掷任意多次——这里要画个自循环。如果匹配Bust骰子就goBust，主动选择Stop就awardPoints，如果掷出预期两倍就触发evilOffer恶魔交易。
rollPress的自循环我标注了"As many times as they want"。evilOffer接受的话进rollEvilOffer，拒绝就awardPoints。rollEvilOffer之后分displayBustEvilOffer和displayWinEvilOffer两种情况？
没错。displayBustEvilOffer直接nextPlayer结束；displayWinEvilOffer有三个出口：可以回到rollPress继续，可以进evilOffer再赌一把，也可以awardPoints见好就收。最后nextPlayer统一连到EtcdCluster。

全部完成了。我检查一遍：WorkerNode起头，经过playerCount和establishBonusPoints进入EstablishBust，内部有rollBust、awardBustChoice等分支，高风险拒绝走RedisCache；然后进PressLoop，rollPress自循环，goBust和awardPoints都导向nextPlayer，evilOffer有完整的选择和展示分支，最终都汇总到EtcdCluster。
